description: Prompts de alta calidad para generar thumbnails con IA

styles.dramatic_historical: Epic historical scene with dramatic lighting, dark atmospheric background, strong contrast between light and shadows, documentary style photography, cinematic color grading
styles.war_epic: Dramatic war scene with military imagery, smoke and fire effects, heroic composition, desaturated with orange and gray tones, epic scale photography
styles.solemn_historical: Solemn and respectful historical composition, muted colors with single accent color, memorial aesthetic, dignified and powerful
styles.space_epic: Epic space scene, stars and nebulae, astronaut silhouette, NASA photography style, electric blue and gold color palette
styles.dramatic_liberation: Liberation and freedom theme, crowd scenes, raised fists, warm golden lighting, triumph and joy composition
styles.dramatic_disaster: Dramatic disaster scene, motion blur, emergency lighting, tension and urgency, high contrast photography
styles.exploration_adventure: Adventure and exploration aesthetic, vintage map elements, ships and horizons, warm sepia tones with vivid accents
styles.liberation_celebration: Victory celebration scene, confetti and crowds, warm golden lighting, joyful energy, wide angle composition
styles.patriotic_historical: Patriotic historical scene, flags and symbols, strong blue and red colors, heroic composition
styles.solemn_memorial: Memorial and remembrance aesthetic, candles or flowers, soft diffused lighting, somber and respectful
styles.crime_noir: Film noir aesthetic, dark shadows, rain-slicked streets, 1920s atmosphere, high contrast black and white with red accents
styles.political_historical: Political and governmental imagery, power and authority, formal composition, strong contrast
styles.adventure_triumph: Mountain summit triumph, extreme weather, climbers silhouette, dramatic sky, cold blue and white tones
styles.economic_drama: Financial crisis imagery, falling numbers, worried crowds, desaturated with harsh fluorescent lighting
styles.environmental_hope: Nature and environmental imagery, lush green and blue tones, hopeful golden light, global perspective
styles.invention_triumph: Inventor triumphant moment, workshop setting, warm incandescent light, steampunk aesthetic accents
styles.civil_rights_epic: Civil rights movement imagery, diverse crowd, raised signs, warm summer light, powerful and dignified
styles.civil_rights_portrait: Dignified portrait style, strong and determined expression, simple background, powerful lighting
styles.political_tragedy: Tragic political moment, somber and heavy atmosphere, dark tones with spotlight, newsreel aesthetic
styles.military_operation: Military operation aesthetic, night vision green tones, tactical silhouettes, tension and precision
styles.natural_disaster: Raw natural power, massive scale, water or earthquake imagery, desaturated with teal and orange
styles.nuclear_disaster: Nuclear and radiation imagery, warning signs, eerie green glow, abandoned industrial setting
styles.space_tragedy: Space tragedy aesthetic, fire against black space, debris and explosion, somber yet majestic
styles.pop_culture_epic: Pop culture iconic imagery, vibrant colors, iconic visual elements, nostalgic yet epic
styles.aviation_triumph: Aviation triumph scene, aircraft breaking sound barrier, speed lines and clouds, patriotic military aesthetic
styles.war_occupation: Occupied city scene, military presence, defiant civilians, gray and oppressive atmosphere with single point of hope
styles.political_historic: Monumental political change, falling symbols of power, masses of people, symbolic imagery

short_prompt_template: Create a vertical thumbnail (1080x1920 pixels) for a YouTube Short about the historical event: '{title}' ({year}). Style: {base_style}. Include: large bold text at top saying '{day} DE {month_name}' in Spanish, a central dramatic image representing the event, intense cinematic lighting with strong shadows, deep saturated colors (red, black, gold), the text '{emotion}' feeling throughout. The design should be eye-catching on a mobile screen, with a central focal point that draws the eye immediately. NO text at bottom (reserved for YouTube interface). High contrast, ultra-detailed, photorealistic quality.
long_prompt_template: Create a horizontal thumbnail (1280x720 pixels) for a YouTube video about the historical event: '{title}' ({year}). Style: {base_style}. Include: left side text block with 'UN DÍA COMO HOY' in small text and '{title}' as the main title in large bold white text, right side with a dramatic photorealistic image of the event or its key figures, a strong visual dividing element between text and image, intense and dramatic color grading (deep reds, blacks, golds). The overall feeling should be {emotion}, cinematic, documentary style. Ultra high resolution, sharp, professional YouTube thumbnail design. The image should be compelling enough that someone stops scrolling.

shorts: 2. Fondo: imagen histórica del evento (busca en Unsplash o Wikipedia Commons)
4. Bloque rojo (#C0392B) en la parte superior
5. Texto de fecha: blanco, Montserrat Black, 120px
6. Título del evento: blanco, Montserrat Bold, 80px, máx 3 líneas
7. Logo del canal en esquina inferior derecha
long_video: 2. Divide en dos mitades: izquierda (texto) y derecha (imagen)
4. Imagen derecha: evento histórico con overlay mínimo
5. Etiqueta 'UN DÍA COMO HOY' en amarillo (#F39C12)
6. Título del evento: blanco, Montserrat Black, máx 4 líneas
7. Línea diagonal roja entre las dos secciones
